description: Monetary-policy stance; affects demand, inflation expectations, discount rates, and asset prices.
Long-rate minus fed funds spread; captures term-structure expectations and policy tightness.
Equity-market risk/uncertainty proxy; forward-looking financial-stress signal.
Forward-looking housing cycle; interest-sensitive demand and wealth channel.
Equity valuation signal; connects earnings expectations and discount-rate pressure.
Headline CPI inflation momentum; direct inflation persistence signal.
Energy-price shock channel; important for headline inflation and equity discount/cost pressure.
Labor-market slack; Phillips-curve style demand pressure and recession-risk proxy.
Alternative broad consumption price index; cross-checks CPI with a Fed-relevant price concept.
Producer-price commodity pressure; upstream cost signal before consumer-price pass-through.
